title: apium anisoides
intro: Apium anisoides, also known as sea celery or wild celery, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Apium anisoides include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in cooking as a flavoring agent, although it is often used in small quantities due to its strong flavor.
